racers.name: Coach
racers.ability_description: Everyone on my space gets +1 to their main move, including me.

racers.name: Copycat
racers.ability_description: I have the power of the racer currently in the lead. If there's a tie, I pick.

racers.name: Banana
racers.ability_description: Trip any racer that stops on my space, or when I stop on theirs.

racers.name: Cheerleader
racers.ability_description: At the start of my turn, I can make the racer(s) in last place move 2. If I do, I move 1.

racers.name: Dicemonger
racers.ability_description: Anyone can reroll their main move once per turn. When another racer does it, I move 1.

racers.name: Leaptoad
racers.ability_description: While moving, I skip spaces with other racers on them.

racers.name: Legs
racers.ability_description: I can skip rolling for my main move and move 5 instead.

racers.name: Lackey
racers.ability_description: When another racer rolls a 1 for their main move, they skip that move and I move 1.

racers.name: Lovable Loser
racers.ability_description: At the start of my turn, I get a bronze point chip if I'm alone in last place.

racers.name: Magician
racers.ability_description: At the start of my turn, I can warp a racer to my space.

racers.name: Party Animal
racers.ability_description: If Huge Baby parties onto my space, everyone there gets put 1 space back.

racers.name: Rocket Scientist
racers.ability_description: When I roll for my main move, I can move double that number. If I do, I trip.

racers.name: Romantic
racers.ability_description: When anyone stops on a space with exactly one other racer, I move 2.

racers.name: Scoocher
racers.ability_description: When another racer's power happens, I move 1.

racers.name: Suckerfish
racers.ability_description: When a racer on my space moves, I can also move to their new space.

racers.name: Third Wheel
racers.ability_description: Before my race, I take 4 point chips.

racers.name: Skipper
racers.ability_description: When anyone rolls a 1 for their main move, I go next in turn order.

racers.name: Flip Flop
racers.ability_description: I can skip rolling for my main move and swap spaces with another racer instead.

racers.name: Hare
racers.ability_description: When I roll for my main move, I can move 4 if I roll a 1 or 2 (predicting).

racers.name: Duelist
racers.ability_description: Whenever a racer shares my space, I can shout DUEL! We roll our dice and whoever rolls highest moves 2.

racers.name: Gunk
racers.ability_description: Other racers get -1 to their main move.

racers.name: Huge Baby
racers.ability_description: No one can ever be on my space, besides the start space. Whenever that would happen, put the racer on the space behind me instead.

racers.name: Blimp
racers.ability_description: I float above the track and can't be tripped.

racers.name: Alchemist
racers.ability_description: I can convert my bronze chips to silver chips during scoring.

racers.name: Baba Yaga
racers.ability_description: I can curse a racer to move -1 on their next main move.

racers.name: Centaur
racers.ability_description: I move an extra space for free each turn.

racers.name: Inchworm
racers.ability_description: I move 1 extra space whenever I move an even number.

racers.name: Mastermind
racers.ability_description: I can see all racers' positions and plan accordingly.

racers.name: M.O.U.T.H.
racers.ability_description: When I move, I can announce it loudly and prevent one other racer from moving.

racers.name: Twin
racers.ability_description: When another racer moves, I can move the same amount.

racers.name: Sisyphus
racers.ability_description: I move slower but can push other racers forward with me.

racers.name: Stickler
racers.ability_description: I can negate one illegal action per race.

racers.name: Hypnotist
racers.ability_description: I can make a racer skip their next turn.

racers.name: Genius
racers.ability_description: I can reroll my die once per race for free.

racers.name: Egg
racers.ability_description: I'm easily tripped, but when I finish, I get a bonus point.

racers.name: The Flash
racers.ability_description: On your main move, move twice. Each move triggers abilities separately.
